what: Apply remote changes to local vault
why: Update local knowledge with team changes
output: Merge result with list of updated, added, deleted, and skipped files

success_handling.criteria: All non-conflicting remote changes are applied to local vault

error_handling.criteria: One or more files have conflicting local and remote changes that cannot be auto-resolved
error_handling.action: Skip conflicting files, apply non-conflicting changes, report conflicts for user resolution

event.message: Merge completed with conflicts requiring user resolution

decisions.outcome: Proceed to update-index step with partial merge, user resolves conflicts later
